income = 250_000
lowtaxland_rate = 0.05 # 5%
ripoffland_rate = 0.43 #43%

Lowtaxland = income * lowtaxland_rate
Ripoffland = income * ripoffland_rate
difference = Ripoffland - Lowtaxland

print('Your income is',income,'and you would pay',Lowtaxland,'income tax in Lowtaxland or',Ripoffland,'income tax in Ripoffland.You would save',difference,'by paying taxes in Lowtaxland!')
